title: Supply Chain Manager - Aramex India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Aramex India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
